info.description:
CreativeAccess API is a collection of RESTful APIs meant to help you build powerful access based applications.

##Allowed HTTPs requests

- `POST` - Creates or updates a resource

- `PUT` - Updates a resource

- `GET` - Retrieves a resource or list of resources

- `DELETE` - Deletes a resource

##Typical Server Responses

- 200 `OK` - The request was successful (some API calls may return 201 instead).

- 201 `Created` - The request was successful and a resource was created.

- 204 `No Content` - The request was successful but there is no representation to return (that is, the response is empty).

- 400 `Bad Request` - The request could not be understood or was missing required parameters.

- 401 `Unauthorized` - Authentication failed or user does not have permissions for the requested operation.

- 403 `Forbidden` - Access denied.

- 404 `Not Found` - Resource was not found.

- 405 `Method Not Allowed` - Requested method is not supported for the specified resource.

- 429 `Too Many Requests` - Exceeded GoodData API limits. Pause requests, wait one minute, and try again.

- 503 `Service Unavailable` - The service is temporary unavailable (e.g. scheduled Platform Maintenance). Try again later.

##DateTime members

All datetime members from the request and response objects are in E. Europe Standard Time timezone

tags.description:
Manage vacations in JSON format to be used in a programmatic mode. The vacations are based on a type, which is from the following list User needs `Configuration-Vacations` permission The vacation types are:
Id Detail
1 CO - concediu odihna
2 CM01 - boala obisnuita
5 CCC - concediu crestere copil
6 CF - concediu fara plata
10 CS - contract suspendat
12 ES - evenimente speciale
13 ZL - zi libera
14 CO75 - concediu odihna pentru situatii speciale 75%
15 ST75 - somaj tehnic 75%
16 CST - concediu de studii
18 CM02 - accident in timpul deplasarii la/de la locul de munca
20 CM03 - accident de munca
21 CM04 - boala profesionala
22 CM05 - boala infecto contagioasa din grupa A
23 CM06 - urgenta medico chirurgicala
24 CM07 - carantina
25 CM08 - sarcina si lauzie
26 CM09 - ingrijire copil bolnav in varsta de pana la 7 ani sau copil cu handicap pentru afectiuni intercurente pana la implinirea varstei de 18 ani
27 CM10 - reducerea cu o patrime a duratei normale de munca
28 CM11 - trecerea temporara in alta munca
29 CM12 - tuberculoza
30 CM13 - boala cardio
31 CM14 - neoplazii, SIDA
32 CM15 - risc maternal
33 CM51 - boala infectocontagioasa pentru care se instituie masura izolarii
34 CMAZ - concediu pentru analize medicale
35 CM17 - Ingrijire pacient cu afectiuni oncologice
36 CM91 - Ingrijire copil bolnav cu afectiuni grave, in varsta de pana la 18 ani
37 CM92 - Supravegherea si ingrijirea copilului in varsta de pana la 18 ani, pentru care s-a dispus masura carantinei sau a izolarii
39 CI - concediu ingrijitor
40 COS - Concediu de odihna suplimentar
41 AR - zi libera pentru autorecenzare
42 V - zi libera pentru vaccinare
43 DS - zi libera pentru donare sange
tags.name: Vacation

tags.description:
Manage vacation requests in JSON format to be used in a programmatic mode. The vacation requests are based on a type, which is from the following list User needs `Configuration-Request and aprove vacations` permission The vacation types are:
Id Detail
1 CO - concediu odihna
2 CM01 - boala obisnuita
6 CF - concediu fara plata
12 ES - evenimente speciale
16 CST - concediu de studii
34 CMAZ - concediu pentru analize medicale
39 CI - concediu ingrijitor
tags.name: Vacation Request

tags.description:
Manage documents in JSON format to be used in a programmatic mode. User needs `Electronic Signatures` permission for all methods General classes DocumentSignAuthTypes:
Id Detail Description
0 AdvancedDouble Double authentication: documents sent on email and OTP code on SMS
1 AdvancedEmail Double authentication: documents sent on email and OPT code also on email
2 AdvancedSMS Double authentication: documents sent on SMS and OPT code also on SMS
3 SimpleEmail Unique authentication: documents sent on email without OTP code
* This type is not use while creating a document. It will be automatically handled. Use Simple instead
4 SimpleSMS Unique authentication: documents sent on SMS without OTP code
* This type is not use while creating a document. It will be automatically handled. Use Simple instead
5 Simple Unique authentication: without OTP code
DocumentStatuses:
Id Detail
0 Not Signed
1 Signed by employee(s)
2 Signed by manager
3 Signed
4 Cancelled
5 Signed by partial employees
6 Marked for archive
7 Archived
tags.name: Document
